mapper.insert: insert into run_events (run_id, user_id, thread_id, event_type, payload_json, created_at) values (#{event.runId}, #{event.userId}, #{event.threadId}, #{event.eventType}, #{event.payloadJson}::jsonb, #{event.createdAt})
mapper.select: select event_id, run_id, user_id, thread_id, event_type, payload_json, created_at from run_events where user_id = #{userId} and thread_id = #{threadId} and run_id = #{runId} order by created_at asc
